summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (phone number login) and REQ-2 (admin Add Product navigation). REQ-1 is largely fulfilled: AuthGuard shows a phone-number-only input with validation and error messages, LoginButton shows logout/phone display, ProfileSetup stores phone number, and the backend UserProfile now includes phoneNumber. REQ-2 is largely fulfilled: Header.tsx includes an admin 'Add Product' link for both desktop and mobile, and App.tsx includes the /admin/create-product route. However, some acceptance criteria have gaps, particularly around Internet Identity still being used as the underlying auth mechanism.

missing_requirements.requirement: No email, password, or Internet Identity prompt is shown; phone number IS the authentication mechanism (not just stored alongside II)
missing_requirements.reason: The AuthGuard stores the phone in sessionStorage and then calls login() which still triggers Internet Identity (useInternetIdentity hook). The phone number is collected but II is still the underlying auth; the user may still see an II popup. The phone is used to populate the profile but not as the sole session identifier.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend associates sessions/profiles with the phone number as the primary identifier
missing_requirements.reason: The backend still uses Principal (from Internet Identity) as the map key for userProfiles, with phoneNumber added only as a profile data field. Sessions are still Principal-based, not phone-number-based.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) added to handle old UserProfile to new UserProfile with phoneNumber field
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration module was requested in the build request. While adding phoneNumber to the backend profile is requested, a separate migration.mo file was not specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Phone number displayed as a formatted pill badge in the header for authenticated users
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify displaying the user's phone number in the header navigation after login. This is an extra UI feature not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Indian phone number validation with +91 prefix enforced using regex restricting to digits starting with 6-9
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies phone number login but does not restrict to Indian numbers or require +91 prefix validation. This is a regional constraint not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetup modal collects both name AND phone number for new users after login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies phone number as the login/identifier field. Collecting a name in a separate profile setup modal was not specified as a requirement.
